subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-02 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: In the city of New York, upon a certain day, an invitation was extended to a church. One of the nobles of India had journeyed unto that city and had altered his raiment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در نیویورک یک روزی به یک کلیسائی دعوت کرده بودند.  یکی از خوانین هند به نیویورک آمده و تغییر لباس کرده بود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
